headline: Resolved Allbirds, Inc. (BIRD, Nasdaq, USD). Footwear assets being sold to American Exchange Group (~$39M, DEFM14A 2026-05-08); company pivoting to AI/GPU compute (rename 'NewBird AI'). Legacy footwear should be treated as discontinued.
flags: in-flight footwear asset sale to American Exchange Group (~$39M, expected Q2 2026 close)
pivot to AI/GPU compute infrastructure, rename to NewBird AI (~$50M convertible facility)
dual-class: only Class A (BIRD) is listed
net cash / EV not yet computed — pro-forma after sale + convertible (financials/valuation lanes)
